title: Sniperking's mask from one piece
description: This is the Mask From Sniperking / Sogeking the secret identity of Usopp
body:
### This is the Mask From Sniperking / Sogeking the secret identity of Usopp
### 

**Just name a pumpkin: Sniperking Mask**
![you can see Usopp as sniper king in a minecraft plains biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de2b0687f0ab1154729820dd01d0258a370d0179.webp)
**you will need optifne(forge) or CIT Resewn(fabric) to let it work**
